name: affine-prefix-fixed-point-horizontal-partial-occupancy
claim: For every B>=2 in the pinned characteristic-five affine-prefix fixed-point family, the horizontal two-fold refinement has profile counts N_Bf=[y^(2B)x^f]H(y,x)G(y,x)^(B-1), exact add-back sum_f N_Bf=c_B/2, pairwise disjoint slope images of those exact sizes, and raw maximum-profile exponent (1/4)log(14).

live_overlap.overlap_result: No exact G/H profile specialization was found; the two live PRs touch unrelated Lean and head-floor files.

finite_replay.python39_compatibility_transcription: Only int.bit_count() was replaced by bin(mask).count('1') in an isolated replay copy; all expected-output hashes were unchanged.

nonclaims: no value of e_B or retained C3 theorem
no degree-two folding polynomial or locator composition
no finite or asymptotic ledger delta
remaining_wall: Construct a literal source-valid semantic classifier and first-match order for the raw profile images, determine earlier ownership and the retained set, and avoid charging repeated support labels as new MCA slopes.
